_meta.description: ELK Stack Index Lifecycle Management policy with hot-warm-cold-frozen-delete phases. This policy is designed for time-series log data with decreasing access frequency over time. Apply to index templates via: PUT _ilm/policy/elk-lifecycle-policy

documentation.hot_phase: Active writes and queries. Rolls over at 30GB or 1 day. Priority 100 ensures hot indices are recovered first after restart.
documentation.warm_phase: Read-only, optimized for storage. Shrinks to 1 shard, force-merges to 1 segment. Moves to warm-tier nodes after 7 days.
documentation.cold_phase: Infrequent access. Moves to cold-tier nodes after 30 days. Optional searchable snapshot for cost reduction.
documentation.frozen_phase: Rare access via searchable snapshots on shared cache. Data lives in object storage (S3/GCS/Azure). After 90 days.
documentation.delete_phase: Permanent deletion after 365 days. Waits for snapshot confirmation before deleting.
